name: Fruit Pizza
recipeIngredient: 18 ounces pineapple chunks in juice, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the cookie roll into 3/8-inch rounds and place them on a greased 10-inch pizza pan, pressing the edges together to form a crust.
2. Bake according to package directions until set, then let cool completely.
3. Spread the cream cheese mixture over the cooled cookie crust.
4. Arrange strawberries around the outer edge of the pizza.
5. Place bananas and peach slices next in rows.
6. Mound pineapple chunks in the center.
7. Prepare orange sauce by combining sugar, salt, and cornstarch in a saucepan. Add orange juice, lemon juice, and water; cook over medium heat until boiling for 1 minute, stirring constantly. Let cool before pouring over the pizza.
8. Chill until ready to serve.
